body_txt: WHOA! This guy is, like , Totally Radical ! He's a lot like The Stoner , except mostly without the drugs , but he might smoke some pot once in a while... sometimes. Most of them don't actually surf (on-screen, at least), although some may own a surfboard for the sake of validity. And they're "most excellent" in surfer speak . They are The Slacker and work only enough to pay for their somewhat expensive sunglasses, non-expensive board shorts, and enough sunscreen to last a millennium (or forty). They all tend to live in California , but if they're not a California dude, expect them to be from Hawaii , Australia , or any other place with a cool beach, and frequent pop-ups of waves. Most triumphant ! Compare Valley Girl , Like Is, Like, a Comma , and Frat Bro . Very likely to be Mr. Fanservice and provide a Walking Shirtless Scene .
